title: <div>       * Obstacles/Issues: [Any problems encountered that need attention]</
content:
* Obstacles/Issues: [Any problems encountered that need attention]
* Next Day Plan (Brief): [What they plan to work on tomorrow]
* Requests Submitted: "Yes/No" (confirms they filled out the Equipment Request Form)
* Example:
* Job Name: Smith Residence (Kitchen Remodel)
* Progress Today: Rough-in plumbing completed for sink and dishwasher. Walls prepped for drywall.
* Obstacles/Issues: None today.
* Next Day Plan: Install shower unit and finish bathroom rough-in.
* Requests Submitted: Yes (need tile adhesive and grout)
* Equipment Request Form (Detailed Needs): Crucially, after the chat update, the employee immediately fills out the Google Form for any equipment or supplies needed for the following day. This is where the detail goes.
B. Beginning-of-Day Check-in (For You/Your Dad/Dispatch)
Purpose: To review overnight requests, finalize the day's plan, and ensure everyone has what they need before heading out.
* Timing: First 30-60 minutes of your workday.
* Method:
context: From document: OK, I have been taken in to my father‘s company, Majestic design. It’s… — chunk 20 (chunk 20/22)
